untranslatable_reason: Signal requires domain-specific derivatives data (settlement_type, intrinsic_value, time_value_decay, days_to_expiration, option_premium) that are not available in the allowed indicator list. These are fundamental options/futures contract properties, not market microstructure indicators. The rule cannot be expressed using only price, technical indicators, and volume data.
translation_notes: This is a fundamental options trading rule from Natenberg about early exercise decision-making. It requires: (1) contract metadata (settlement_type == STOCK-TYPE vs FUTURES-TYPE), (2) options-specific Greeks/values (intrinsic_value, time_value, option_premium), and (3) contract calendar data (days_to_expiration). None of these can be derived from OHLCV or standard technical indicators. The rule belongs in an options pricing module with access to contract specifications and Greeks, not in a price-action backtester.
